message:
🐛 Fix deduplicatedClusters selecting unreachable clusters (#11156)

In dedup.ts, the sort logic was missing the reachability preference that
shared.ts already had (#11145). This meant the extracted pure-function
module could select an unreachable context as primary when deduplicating.

Additionally, both files aggregated reachable:true across all aliases via
`anyReachable`, which could mark the deduplicated entry as reachable even
when the primary context (whose name is used for kubectl) was not. Now
that sorting guarantees the primary is the best reachable candidate, use
`primary.reachable` directly.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
